title: Industrial Automation
summary: AI Software for the Industries That Build Everything Else. We're rebuilding legacy control systems for refineries and chemical plants.
heroH1:
AI Software for the
Industries That Build
Everything Else.
heroSub: Refineries, chemical plants, distribution centers, factories — the physical systems the world depends on run on software that's decades old. We're changing that.

stripItems.title: Alarm Overload
stripItems.desc: Operators drown in thousands of alarms. Critical signals get lost in the noise. We fix this.

stripItems.title: Rationalization
stripItems.desc: Months of spreadsheet-based alarm review eliminated through AI-driven analysis.

stripItems.title: Intelligence
stripItems.desc: Pattern recognition and predictive insights for heavy industrial operations.

rolesSub: Join us in building AI for industrial operations.
